subject: Re: Pool House option B [The Frick]
body:
yes,,,this is more like it.. sorry I didn't get this
email until now,, the pool should be extended a bit
toward the steam... . LEt's try larger arches, and a
shallower roof.. I'm not sure the arches are large
enough
--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

> J,
> In this version, as in the Frick building, the steps
> are in front of the facade, in between the arches
> are the doors to the swimming pool. There is no roof
> area  before the doors,and there is no difference
> between all the doors.J.P.
>

yes,,,this is more like it.. sorry I didn't get this

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

J,
In this version, as in the Frick building, the steps
are in front of the facade, in between the arches
are the doors to the swimming pool. There is no roof
area before the doors,and there is no difference
between all the doors.J.P.
